option.name: notice
option.value:
#set($origYear = $originalComment.match("Copyright \\(c\\) (\\d{4})", 1, "")) Copyright (c) #if($origYear && $origYear != "")${origYear}-${today.year}#else${today.year}#end devjakob https://github.com/PixelClient/nbt
